inputs.label: Motor Rated Power
inputs.businessContext: Nominal power of the motor at full load

inputs.label: Actual Load
inputs.businessContext: Actual mechanical power drawn by the driven equipment

inputs.label: Insulation Max Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable winding temperature (insulation class limit)

inputs.label: Rated Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Standard ambient temperature for motor design (typically 40°C)

inputs.label: Thermal Time Constant
inputs.businessContext: Time for the motor temperature to reach 63.2% of its steady-state rise

inputs.label: Duty Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of time motor runs under load (0-1, 1 = continuous)

formulas.timeToBurnout: motorTemperature > maxInsulationTemp ? 0 : (ultimateTempRise > (maxInsulationTemp - ambientTemperature) ? -thermalTimeConstant * Math.log(1 - (maxInsulationTemp - ambientTemperature) / ultimateTempRise) : Infinity)
